subcodes.first_line: O thou who art gladdened by the light of the Covenant! The orientalists have drawn forth the lights of guidance from the realities of the Covenant, and the horizons have been illumined [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من استبشر بنور المیثاق قد استشرق المستشرقون انوار الهدی من حقایق المیثاق و استضاء الافاق
subcodes.subjects: @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @praise and encouragement
